creator: vaclav.kocian@wo.cz
text:
libwmf-0.2.8.4 requires LDFLAGS and LD_LIBRARY_PATH set to /usr/X11R6/lib
and CFLAGS set to /usr/X11R6/include. If not set that way, it fails to
build. Upleasant, because, for example, gimp requires libwmf-0.2.8.4 and
therefore fails to build too.

Fix: 

Just set variables properly
How-To-Repeat: try run make install without CFLAGS and LDFLAGS set in make.conf
